section_breakdown.1_person_resolution: Charlotte A. Crutchfield, Esq., D19 House incumbent. Born Dec 8, 1963, Chicago. Age 62 at 2026 air date.
section_breakdown.2_biographical_foundation: Howard BA Econ 1986; BC Law JD 1989; MD Bar 1991, GA Bar 1993. Asst State's Atty MoCo 1991-92; Gulfstream/General Dynamics 1993-2006; MoCo Dem Central Committee 2010-14; MoCo Merit System Protection Bd 2014-17 (chair 2016-17). Widow, 2 children. Silver Spring resident. Delta Sigma Theta member.
section_breakdown.3_deep_news_history: Five phases: Howard/BC Law (silent press); 1991-2006 prosecutor + corporate counsel (silent press); 2010-17 MoCo civic apprenticeship; 2018-22 first term & HB 147 spousal-defense repeal saga; 2022-26 second term, Deputy Majority Whip 2024, committee transition Judiciary -> Govt/Labor/Elections 2026.
section_breakdown.4_political_track_record: Lead sponsor HB 147 (2021 died after Senate amendments; 2022 enacted: House 125-6, Senate 46-0). 2019 women's pre-release mediation unit. 2021 first-degree murder review for minors. 2022 hate-crime civil action. Co-sponsor on marijuana-records expungement bills. Judiciary Committee 2019-25 (chair Fam & Juv Law subcomm 2021-25). 2026- Govt/Labor/Elections (chair Corrections subcomm).
section_breakdown.5_controversies: Clean record. Single moment of friction was procedural: 2021 HB 147 dilution amendments in Senate; she returned next session and got it enacted clean.
section_breakdown.6_listener_focus: 9 listener-flagged topics addressed. Bottom lines: she is NOT a fiscal-restriction candidate; NO public statement on Wootton closure (it's a county school-board matter, not General Assembly); NO position on sanctuary policy in record (caucus alignment supports MD's existing limits); historical record IS the dossier.
section_breakdown.7_open_questions: 8 enumerated gaps including Chicago HS, spouse name/dates, children's particulars, military service tying to Veterans Caucus, voluntary-or-leadership-driven 2025-26 committee move, fiscal-bill roll-call posture, public stance on Wootton/sanctuary, 2026 SBE pre-primary report numbers.
